# codex-go: Full SDK Reference
# Version: v0.2.0 | Protocol schema: v2 | Module: github.com/nharness/sdk/codex-go | Go 1.25+
#
# This file is the comprehensive machine-readable reference for codex-go.
# See llms.txt for the condensed version.

## Overview

codex-go is the official Go SDK for the Codex app-server JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol.
It provides:
  - Transport adapters: stdio (local binary), WebSocket, HTTP SSE
  - High-level SessionThread API: synchronous Run(), streaming RunStreamed()
  - Typed event subscription with fan-out pub/sub
  - Approval/request handler interfaces for interactive turns
  - Wait helpers for turn completion and structured output extraction

## Installation

    go get github.com/nharness/sdk/codex-go

Requires Go 1.25+.

## Quick start (stdio)

    cmd := exec.Command("codex", "app-server", "--stdio")
    stdout, _ := cmd.StdoutPipe()
    stdin, _ := cmd.StdinPipe()
    _ = cmd.Start()

    client, err := codexgo.New(codexgo.WithStdioTransport(stdout, stdin))
    if err != nil { log.Fatal(err) }
    defer client.Close()

    ctx := context.Background()
    _, err = client.Initialize(ctx, codexgo.InitializeRequest{
        ClientInfo:   codexgo.ClientInfo{Name: "my-app", Version: "1.0.0"},
        Capabilities: codexgo.Capabilities{ExperimentalAPI: true},
    })

    thread, _ := client.StartThread(ctx, codexgo.WithThreadModel("gpt-5.4"))
    defer thread.Close()

    result, _ := thread.Run(ctx, "Say hello.")
    fmt.Println(result.FinalAgentText())

## Quick start (WebSocket)

    dialCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 10*time.Second)
    defer cancel()

    client, err := codexgo.New(
        codexgo.WithWSBearerToken("my-api-key"),
        codexgo.WithWSTransport(dialCtx, "http://codex-server.example.com"),
    )
    if err != nil { log.Fatal(err) }
    defer client.Close()

    _, err = client.Initialize(ctx, codexgo.InitializeRequest{
        ClientInfo:   codexgo.ClientInfo{Name: "my-app", Version: "1.0.0"},
        Capabilities: codexgo.Capabilities{ExperimentalAPI: true},
    })

## Client Options

### Transport options (mutually exclusive, pick one)

    codexgo.WithStdioTransport(r io.ReadCloser, w io.WriteCloser) Option
        Wrap a process's stdin/stdout. Used for local codex binary.

    codexgo.WithTransport(t Transport) Option
        Use a custom Transport implementation.

    codexgo.WithHTTPTransport(endpoint string) Option
        WIP. HTTP+SSE transport. The Codex app-server is WebSocket-only; this
        transport requires the ws-http-bridge sidecar
        (plugins/codex-server/ws-http-bridge) in front of the server. Without the
        bridge, requests fail with HTTP 405. Prefer WithWSTransport.

    codexgo.WithWSTransport(dialCtx context.Context, endpoint string) Option
        WebSocket transport. Recommended for remote servers.
        dialCtx controls the initial connection timeout only.

    codexgo.WithReconnectingHTTPTransport(endpoint string) Option
        WIP. Like WithHTTPTransport but auto-reconnects; same bridge requirement.

    codexgo.WithRetry(cfg transport.RetryConfig) Option
        Wrap the current transport with retry logic.

### Auth options

    codexgo.WithHTTPBearerToken(token string) Option
        Sets Authorization: Bearer <token> on HTTP transport requests.

    codexgo.WithWSBearerToken(token string) Option
        Sets Authorization: Bearer <token> on WebSocket handshake.

### Handler options

    codexgo.WithApprovalHandler(handler ApprovalHandler) Option
        Typed handler for command execution, file change, and permissions approvals.

    codexgo.WithRequestHandler(handler RequestHandler) Option
        Raw JSON-RPC server-request handler (lower level than ApprovalHandler).

### Concurrency options

    codexgo.WithMaxThreads(n int) Option
        Limit concurrent SessionThread instances.
        n = 0  → default (64)
        n = -1 → unlimited
        n > 0  → exactly n concurrent threads allowed
        StartThread/ResumeThread block until a slot is available or ctx is done.

## High-Level API: SessionThread

StartThread and ResumeThread return a *SessionThread, which:
  - Serializes concurrent turns via an internal mutex
  - Releases a semaphore slot on Close()
  - Provides convenience wrappers for all thread/turn operations

    thread, err := client.StartThread(ctx context.Context, opts ...ThreadOption) (*SessionThread, error)
    thread, err := client.ResumeThread(ctx context.Context, threadID string, opts ...ThreadOption) (*SessionThread, error)
    thread.Close()  // MUST call to release semaphore slot; idempotent and goroutine-safe

ThreadOption values:
    codexgo.WithThreadModel(model string)
    codexgo.WithThreadApprovalPolicy(policy string)
    codexgo.WithThreadApprovalMode(mode ApprovalMode)
    codexgo.WithThreadCWD(cwd string)
    codexgo.WithThreadEphemeral(ephemeral bool)
    codexgo.WithInitialInput(input string)
        When set, StartThread/ResumeThread block until the first turn completes.

## SessionThread Methods

### Turn execution

    result, err := thread.Run(ctx context.Context, input string, opts ...TurnOption) (*TurnResult, error)
        Synchronous: blocks until the turn reaches completed/interrupted/failed.
        Subscribes to events before sending TurnStart to avoid race conditions.
        Returns nil error even for interrupted/failed turns; check result.Turn.Status.

    events, err := thread.RunStreamed(ctx context.Context, input string, opts ...TurnOption) (<-chan ThreadEvent, error)
        Streaming: returns a channel that receives ThreadEvent values until the turn ends.
        The channel is closed on turn completion or context cancellation.
        Callers MUST drain the channel (or cancel ctx) to release the turn mutex.
        ThreadEvent{Kind string, Raw any}

TurnOption values:
    codexgo.WithModel(model string)
    codexgo.WithApprovalPolicy(policy string)
    codexgo.WithApprovalMode(mode ApprovalMode)
    codexgo.WithSandbox(policy string)
    codexgo.WithSandboxMode(mode SandboxMode)
    codexgo.WithCWD(cwd string)
    codexgo.WithEffort(effort string)
    codexgo.WithSkill(skill string)
    codexgo.WithInputs(inputs ...TurnInput)

### Mid-turn control

    err := thread.Steer(ctx context.Context, turnID, input string) error
        Send additional text input to an in-progress turn.

    err := thread.SteerInputs(ctx context.Context, turnID string, inputs ...TurnInput) error
        Send typed multi-part input to an in-progress turn.

    err := thread.Interrupt(ctx context.Context, turnID string) error
        Send turn/interrupt to stop the current turn.

### Thread management

    err := thread.Archive(ctx context.Context) error
    err := thread.Unarchive(ctx context.Context) error
    err := thread.SetName(ctx context.Context, name string) error
    err := thread.Rollback(ctx context.Context, turnIDs []string) error
    err := thread.Compact(ctx context.Context) error
        Triggers async context compaction (background LLM call on server).

    forked, err := thread.Fork(ctx context.Context, turnID string, opts ...ThreadOption) (*SessionThread, error)
        Create a new thread branching from this one. turnID="" forks from latest.

    diff, err := thread.GitDiff(ctx context.Context, turnID string) (string, error)
        Returns unified diff for the given turn (or latest if turnID="").

### Goal tracking

    err := thread.SetGoal(ctx context.Context, goal string) error
    goal, err := thread.GetGoal(ctx context.Context) (ThreadGoal, error)
    err := thread.ClearGoal(ctx context.Context) error

## TurnResult

    type TurnResult struct {
        Turn      Turn        // final turn state; always populated
        Items     []Item      // items from streaming events + turn state
        Usage     *TokenUsage // nil when server does not report usage
        Error     *TurnError  // non-nil when Status is "failed"
        DeltaText string      // reconstructed agent text from delta events
    }

    func (r *TurnResult) FinalAgentText() string
        Returns the last agent-message text. Search order:
        1. Items: scans for ItemKindAgentMessage, extracts "text"/"content" fields
        2. Turn.Items: same scan on server-returned items
        3. DeltaText: joined streaming delta text
        Returns "" if no agent text is found (e.g., interrupted turn, no LLM call).

## Low-Level Client Methods

All methods take context.Context as the first argument.

### Initialization

    (c *Client) Initialize(ctx, InitializeRequest) (InitializeResult, error)
    (c *Client) Ping(ctx) error
    (c *Client) Close() error

### Thread lifecycle

    (c *Client) ThreadStart(ctx, ThreadStartRequest) (Thread, error)
    (c *Client) ThreadResume(ctx, ThreadResumeRequest) (Thread, error)
    (c *Client) ThreadRead(ctx, ThreadReadRequest) (Thread, error)
    (c *Client) ThreadFork(ctx, ThreadForkRequest) (Thread, error)
    (c *Client) ThreadList(ctx, ThreadListRequest) ([]Thread, error)
    (c *Client) ThreadLoadedList(ctx) ([]string, error)
    (c *Client) ThreadArchive(ctx, ThreadArchiveRequest) error
    (c *Client) ThreadUnarchive(ctx, ThreadUnarchiveRequest) error
    (c *Client) ThreadSetName(ctx, ThreadSetNameRequest) error
    (c *Client) ThreadRollback(ctx, ThreadRollbackRequest) error

### Turn lifecycle

    (c *Client) TurnStart(ctx, TurnStartRequest) (Turn, error)
    (c *Client) TurnInterrupt(ctx, TurnInterruptRequest) error
    (c *Client) TurnSteer(ctx, TurnSteerRequest) error
    (c *Client) TurnDiff(ctx, TurnDiffRequest) (TurnDiffResult, error)
    (c *Client) TurnRead(ctx, threadID, turnID string) (Turn, error)

### Thread goals

    (c *Client) ThreadGoalSet(ctx, ThreadGoalSetRequest) (ThreadGoal, error)
    (c *Client) ThreadGoalGet(ctx, ThreadGoalGetRequest) (ThreadGoal, error)
    (c *Client) ThreadGoalClear(ctx, ThreadGoalClearRequest) error

### Config (slash-command equivalents)

    (c *Client) SetModel(ctx, model string) error
    (c *Client) SetApprovalPolicy(ctx, policy string) error
    (c *Client) SetSandboxPolicy(ctx, policy string) error
    (c *Client) Models(ctx) ([]string, error)

### Config CRUD

    (c *Client) ConfigRead(ctx, ConfigReadRequest) (ConfigReadResult, error)
        ConfigReadRequest{CWD, IncludeLayers}; result {Config, Layers, Origins json.RawMessage}.
    (c *Client) ConfigValueWrite(ctx, ConfigValueWriteRequest) error
        {FilePath, KeyPath, Value json.RawMessage, MergeStrategy ("replace"|"upsert"), ExpectedVersion}.
    (c *Client) ConfigBatchWrite(ctx, ConfigBatchWriteRequest) error
        {FilePath, Edits json.RawMessage, ExpectedVersion, ReloadUserConfig}.

### Skills

    (c *Client) SkillsList(ctx, SkillsListRequest) (SkillsListResult, error)
        SkillsListRequest{CWDs, ForceReload}; result Data []SkillsListEntry{CWD, Skills, Errors}.
    (c *Client) SkillsConfigWrite(ctx, SkillsConfigWriteRequest) (SkillsConfigWriteResult, error)
        {Name|Path, Enabled} -> {EffectiveEnabled}.
    (c *Client) SkillsExtraRootsSet(ctx, SkillsExtraRootsSetRequest) error  // {ExtraRoots []string}

### Experimental features

    (c *Client) ExperimentalFeatureList(ctx, ExperimentalFeatureListRequest) (ExperimentalFeatureListResult, error)
        {ThreadID, Cursor, Limit} -> {Data []ExperimentalFeature, NextCursor}. Empty NextCursor = last page.
    (c *Client) ExperimentalFeatureEnablementSet(ctx, req) (ExperimentalFeatureEnablementSetResult, error)
        {Enablement map[string]bool} -> {Enablement map[string]bool}.

### Hooks (server-side)

    (c *Client) HooksList(ctx, HooksListRequest) (HooksListResult, error)
        {CWDs} -> {Data json.RawMessage}. Distinct from the client-side hook bridge (internal/hookbridge).

### Thread extras (metadata / subscription / mutations)

    (c *Client) ThreadMetadataUpdate(ctx, ThreadMetadataUpdateRequest) (ThreadMetadataUpdateResult, error)
        {ThreadID, GitInfo *{Branch,OriginURL,Sha *string}} -> {Thread}. Patch stored Git metadata.
    (c *Client) ThreadUnsubscribe(ctx, ThreadUnsubscribeRequest) (ThreadUnsubscribeResult, error)
        {ThreadID} -> {Status: "notLoaded"|"notSubscribed"|"unsubscribed"}. Stops event delivery.
    (c *Client) ThreadDelete(ctx, ThreadDeleteRequest) error                 // {ThreadID}
    (c *Client) ThreadInjectItems(ctx, ThreadInjectItemsRequest) error       // {ThreadID, Items []json.RawMessage}
    (c *Client) ThreadShellCommand(ctx, ThreadShellCommandRequest) error     // {ThreadID, Command}; unsandboxed, shell syntax
    (c *Client) ThreadApproveGuardianDeniedAction(ctx, req) error            // {ThreadID, Event json.RawMessage}

### Model provider capabilities

    (c *Client) ModelProviderCapabilitiesRead(ctx) (ModelProviderCapabilities, error)
        -> {NamespaceTools, ImageGeneration, WebSearch bool}.

### Interactive command execution (PTY)

    (c *Client) CommandExec(ctx, CommandExecRequest) (CommandExecResult, error)
        CommandExecRequest{Command []string, CWD, Env, TTY, Size *{Cols,Rows}, StreamStdin,
        StreamStdoutStderr, TimeoutMs, DisableTimeout, OutputBytesCap, DisableOutputCap,
        ProcessID, SandboxPolicy json.RawMessage}; result {ExitCode, Stdout, Stderr}.
    (c *Client) CommandExecWrite(ctx, CommandExecWriteRequest) error      // {ProcessID, DeltaBase64, CloseStdin}
    (c *Client) CommandExecResize(ctx, CommandExecResizeRequest) error    // {ProcessID, Size{Cols,Rows}}
    (c *Client) CommandExecTerminate(ctx, CommandExecTerminateRequest) error // {ProcessID}
    (c *Client) CommandExecHandle(processID string) *CommandExecHandle
        Handle: Write(ctx, deltaBase64) / CloseStdin(ctx) / Resize(ctx, cols, rows) / Terminate(ctx).
    Streaming: subscribe to CommandExecOutputDeltaEvent{ProcessID, Stream, DeltaBase64, CapReached} via Events().

### Events and wait helpers

    (c *Client) Events() *EventSubscription
    (c *Client) WaitForTurn(ctx, threadID, turnID string) (Turn, error)
    (c *Client) WaitForFinalAgentMessage(ctx, threadID, turnID string) (string, error)
    (c *Client) WaitForStructuredOutput(ctx, threadID, turnID string, out any) (Turn, error)

## Event Subscription

    sub := client.Events()
    defer sub.Close()

    for {
        select {
        case event, ok := <-sub.C():
            if !ok { return } // broker closed
            switch v := event.Value.(type) {
            case codexgo.ItemAgentMessageDeltaEvent:
                fmt.Print(v.Text) // streaming text chunk
            case codexgo.ItemCompletedEvent:
                // v.Item is the completed item
            case codexgo.TurnCompletedEvent:
                // v.Status, v.Usage, v.Turn
            }
        case <-ctx.Done():
            return
        }
    }

Notes:
  - Subscribe BEFORE starting a turn to avoid missing early events.
  - The subscription buffer holds 128 events; slow consumers are dropped.
  - Events are not replayed to late subscribers.
  - sub.C() returns nil for a nil/closed subscription (blocks forever in select).

## Typed Notification Payloads

All events have ThreadID and TurnID (where applicable):

    TurnStartedEvent{ThreadID, TurnID string; Turn *Turn}
    TurnCompletedEvent{ThreadID, TurnID string; Status TurnStatus; Turn *Turn; Usage *TokenUsage}
    ItemStartedEvent{ThreadID, TurnID string; Item *Item}
    ItemCompletedEvent{ThreadID, TurnID string; Item *Item}
    ItemUpdatedEvent{ThreadID, TurnID string; Item *Item}
    ThreadTokenUsageUpdatedEvent{ThreadID string; Usage *TokenUsage}
    TurnDiffUpdatedEvent{ThreadID, TurnID string; Diff json.RawMessage}
    TurnPlanUpdatedEvent{ThreadID, TurnID string; Plan json.RawMessage}
    ErrorEvent{ThreadID, TurnID, Message, Code string; Data json.RawMessage}
    ThreadStartedEvent{ThreadID string; Thread *Thread}
    ThreadArchivedEvent{ThreadID string}
    ThreadUnarchivedEvent{ThreadID string}
    ThreadClosedEvent{ThreadID string}
    ThreadStatusChangedEvent{ThreadID string; Status ThreadStatus}
    ThreadGoalUpdatedEvent{ThreadID string; Goal *ThreadGoal}
    ThreadGoalClearedEvent{ThreadID string}
    ServerRequestResolvedEvent{ThreadID, RequestID string; Result json.RawMessage}
    ItemAgentMessageDeltaEvent{ThreadID, TurnID, ItemID, Text string; Delta json.RawMessage}
    ItemPlanDeltaEvent{ThreadID, TurnID, ItemID, Text string; Delta json.RawMessage}
    ItemReasoningSummaryTextDeltaEvent{ThreadID, TurnID, ItemID, Text string}
    ItemReasoningSummaryPartAddedEvent{ThreadID, TurnID, ItemID string; Part json.RawMessage}
    ItemReasoningTextDeltaEvent{ThreadID, TurnID, ItemID, Text string}
    ItemCommandExecutionOutputDeltaEvent{ThreadID, TurnID, ItemID, Stream, Output, Delta string}
    ItemFileChangePatchUpdatedEvent{ThreadID, TurnID, ItemID string; Patch json.RawMessage}
    ItemFileChangeOutputDeltaEvent{ThreadID, TurnID, ItemID, Output, Delta string}
    ItemAutoApprovalReviewStartedEvent{ThreadID, TurnID, ItemID string}
    ItemAutoApprovalReviewCompletedEvent{ThreadID, TurnID, ItemID string}
    RawNotificationEvent{ThreadID, TurnID, ItemID string}  // unknown method fallback

## Core Types

    type Thread struct {
        ID     string
        Name   string
        Status ThreadStatus
        Turns  []Turn
    }

    type Turn struct {
        ID          string
        Items       []Item
        ItemsView   TurnItemsView
        Status      TurnStatus
        Error       json.RawMessage
        StartedAt   *time.Time
        CompletedAt *time.Time
        DurationMS  int64
        Usage       *TokenUsage
    }

    type Item struct {
        ID      string
        Kind    ItemKind
        Payload json.RawMessage
    }
    // Payload is the item's content minus "id" and "type" fields.
    // Example agentMessage payload: {"text":"PONG","phase":"final_answer"}
    item.Decode(&v)       // unmarshal Payload into v
    item.PayloadBytes()   // raw JSON bytes of Payload

    type TokenUsage struct {
        InputTokens  int
        OutputTokens int
        TotalTokens  int
    }

    type ThreadGoal struct {
        Objective string
    }

    type TurnError struct {
        Code    string
        Message string
    }

## Enums and Constants

ThreadStatus (wire values):
    ThreadStatusNotLoaded   = "notLoaded"
    ThreadStatusIdle        = "idle"
    ThreadStatusSystemError = "systemError"
    ThreadStatusActive      = "active"

TurnStatus (wire values):
    TurnStatusInProgress  = "inProgress"
    TurnStatusCompleted   = "completed"
    TurnStatusInterrupted = "interrupted"
    TurnStatusFailed      = "failed"

TurnItemsView (wire values):
    TurnItemsViewNotLoaded = "notLoaded"
    TurnItemsViewSummary   = "summary"
    TurnItemsViewFull      = "full"

ApprovalMode (wire values):
    ApprovalModeAuto      = "auto"
    ApprovalModeOnRequest = "on-request"
    ApprovalModeNever     = "never"
    ApprovalModeAlways    = "always"

SandboxMode (wire values):
    SandboxReadOnly        = "read-only"
    SandboxWorkspaceWrite  = "workspace-write"
    SandboxFullAuto        = "full-auto"

ItemKind constants (wire = Go constant name in camelCase):
    ItemKindUserMessage, ItemKindHookPrompt, ItemKindAgentMessage,
    ItemKindPlan, ItemKindReasoning, ItemKindCommandExecution, ItemKindFileChange,
    ItemKindMCPToolCall, ItemKindDynamicToolCall, ItemKindCollabAgentToolCall,
    ItemKindSubAgentActivity, ItemKindWebSearch, ItemKindImageView, ItemKindSleep,
    ItemKindImageGeneration, ItemKindEnteredReviewMode, ItemKindExitedReviewMode,
    ItemKindContextCompaction

## Approval Handling

    type ApprovalHandler interface {
        HandleCommandExecutionApproval(context.Context, CommandExecutionApprovalRequest) (CommandExecutionApprovalResult, error)
        HandleFileChangeApproval(context.Context, FileChangeApprovalRequest) (FileChangeApprovalResult, error)
        HandlePermissionsApproval(context.Context, PermissionsApprovalRequest) (PermissionsApprovalResult, error)
        HandleUserInputRequest(context.Context, UserInputRequest) (UserInputResult, error)
    }

    // Auto-accept all approvals:
    client, _ := codexgo.New(
        codexgo.WithStdioTransport(r, w),
        codexgo.WithApprovalHandler(codexgo.AutoAcceptApprovalHandler{}),
    )

CommandExecution decision constants:
    ApprovalDecisionAccept
    ApprovalDecisionAcceptForSession
    ApprovalDecisionAcceptWithExecPolicyAmendment
    ApprovalDecisionApplyNetworkPolicyAmendment
    ApprovalDecisionDecline
    ApprovalDecisionCancel

FileChange decision constants:
    FileChangeApprovalDecisionAccept
    FileChangeApprovalDecisionAcceptForSession
    FileChangeApprovalDecisionDecline
    FileChangeApprovalDecisionCancel

## Transport Interface (for custom implementations)

    type Transport interface {
        Call(ctx context.Context, method string, params any, result any) error
        Notify(ctx context.Context, method string, params any) error
        SetRequestHandler(RequestHandler)
        Close() error
    }

## Known Limitations

- HTTP transport (WithHTTPTransport, WithReconnectingHTTPTransport) is WIP. The Codex
  app-server is WebSocket-only; these transports require the ws-http-bridge sidecar
  (plugins/codex-server/ws-http-bridge) deployed in front of the server. Connecting
  directly to a WS-only server returns HTTP 405. Use WithWSTransport for remote servers.
- Turn Usage (TokenUsage) is nil when the server does not include usage in the
  turn/read response. Use WaitForFinalAgentMessage then TurnRead to get the most
  up-to-date turn data.
- Events are not replayed: subscribe before TurnStart to avoid missing early events.

## Docs

docs/index.md         -- quickstart examples and feature overview
docs/api-reference.md -- complete type signatures and constants
llms.txt              -- condensed machine-readable reference
